FOR COMPLIANCE

Your AI Associate
on the Compliance Team

From board resolutions to regulatory gap analyses, Associum compresses days of research and documentation and cross-referencing into hours, without cutting corners without cutting corners on corporate governance standards.

Start for Free Explore Enterprise Solutions

An AI-powered end-to-end workflow

Associum's agents manage the entire workflow of policy review, testing, and documentation, from raw inputs to compliance reviews, from analysis to a near-final deliverable.

01

Data Ingestion

Upload documents and datasets from any source. Associum reads, classifies, and enriches every file with third-party data and deep web research.

Unstructured → Understanding
02

Data Extraction

Key obligations, findings, and risk factors are extracted and indexed, each traced to its exact source document and page.

Data → Evidence
03

Findings Synthesis

Findings are structured against the relevant policy, precedent, or risk framework, calibrated to the output type.

Information → Insight
04

Document Generation

Associum produces a near-final resolution, gap analysis, or report, formatted and structured, ready for your review.

Insight → Draft
05

Review and Sign off

Refine the output in-platform. Verify the conclusions, apply firm conventions. Every element is editable before it leaves your hands.

Draft → Decision
WHO IT IS FOR

Built for every compliance role.

Associum handles the work of different corporate secretarial and compliance roles, each with distinct outputs and workflows.

CORPORATE SECRETARIAL

Delegate corporate documentation of meetings, resolutions, and corporate actions in consistent format across every entity, every time.

Associum prepares the board resolutions, statutory filings, and minutes with consistency and precision, across a growing list of entities and jurisdictions.

WHAT ASSOCIUM HANDLES

  • Gets context from past board packs, meeting notes, and governance documentation.
  • Structures the documents, resolutions, or minutes against firm templates and precedents.
  • Drafts statutory documents in a near-final form for your review and sign-off.
  • You manage governance, not repetitive documentation.
SAMPLE OUTPUT
Board Resolution Pack

Statutory resolutions and minutes drafted from board packs, consistent across entities and filings.

SOURCE- TRUTH INSIGHT

Detailed citations support fact base and conclusions.

Analysis and generated files stay on the platform for long-term availability and retrospective review.

If this file is inspected in two years, the trail is already there. The judgment stays with you — the defensibility comes built in.

WORKFLOW AUTOMATION

The work Associum handles

Associum supports the entire workflow of template production, research on regulatory and compliance issues, and document production. Your assessment and conclusions, supported by Associum.

WITHOUT ASSOCIUM

You take on the document work.You lose the hours to it.

Review company policies Research new and upcoming regulations Cross-reference risk exposures Chase internal compliance Map the regulatory impact Assess compliance implementation steps and costs Draft section by section Format to precedent Review for each entity Reconfirm all the details Rework after review notes
WITH ASSOCIUM

You provide direction and context. Associum handles the rest.

Policy mapping Synthesis Drafting Cross-referencing Formatting

You review the draft

Accurate, cited and ready for review

Get up-to-speed on compliance issues in minutes, not days.

Review company policies, research new regulation, and produce draft reviews in less than 30 minutes. Spend your time on questions, assessments, and conclusions, not documentation.

What it means for risk and audit readiness

A missed deadline or an inconsistent file is a risk event, not just a productivity loss. Associum's value compounds across the compliance function as exposure to regulatory and audit risk, not just hours saved.

Missed deadlines

Reduced

Regulatory changes are mapped to affected policies faster, closing the gap between a new obligation and an updated policy.

Audit readiness

Stronger

Every file carries a built-in audit trail back to its source, ready for inspection without a scramble to reconstruct it later.

Consistency across entities

Higher

Every resolution, filing, and file follows the same precedent and standard, reducing the risk of inconsistent treatment across entities.

Coverage capacity

Expanded

The same team covers more regulatory change, more entities, and more KYC files without proportional headcount growth.

This is a risk-reduction lever, not just a productivity tool. Built for CCOs, GCs, and compliance leads evaluating exposure, defensibility, and coverage capacity.

Common Questions from Compliance Professionals

Yes. Associum is built to handle board packs, regulatory guidance, screening results, policy documents, and governance data. It reads the full document, not just the first few pages.

Every finding and claim in an Associum output is traced back to a specific source document, page, and section. If it can't find something in the documents you've uploaded, it won't invent it.

Every conclusion carries a built-in audit trail back to its source. If a file needs to be reconstructed or reviewed months or years later, the trail is already documented, not reconstructed after the fact

Associum is SOC 2 certified and ISO 27001 compliant. Your documents are never used to train any Al model. Data handling details are available on our Security page.

Most users have a structured first draft (resolution, gap analysis, or report) within 20-30 minutes of uploading their documents, depending on document volume.

No setup required. Upload your documents and start. For teams that want outputs in a specific house format, templates can be configured, but it works out of the box from day one.

Still have a question? Use the form on our Contact page and we'll be in touch within one business day.

From board notes to near-final resolutions.
In one environment.

Free to start. No credit card required.
